name: a11y-mcp
description: Validates WCAG 2.2 (AAA) accessibility in HTML, JSX and TSX files using AccessMonitor rules. Shows diagnostics in the Problems panel and exposes tools for GitHub Copilot (MCP).

a11y-mcp.wcagLevel.description: Minimum WCAG conformance level to enforce.

a11y-mcp.include.description: Glob patterns for files to validate.

a11y-mcp.exclude.description: Glob patterns for files to exclude from validation.

languageModelTools.name: a11y_validate_file
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Validates accessibility issues in an HTML, JSX, or TSX file based on WCAG 2.2 (AAA) and AccessMonitor rules. Returns a list of violations with rule ID, WCAG criterion, severity (error/warning/notice), the offending element, line number, and a fix suggestion. Use this when you need to audit a specific file for accessibility problems.

filePath.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path to the HTML, JSX, or TSX file to validate.

languageModelTools.name: a11y_validate_workspace
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Scans all HTML, JSX, and TSX files in the workspace (or a specific sub-folder) for WCAG 2.2 accessibility violations. Returns a summary with total counts per severity and a per-file breakdown. Use this to get an overall picture of accessibility health across a project.

folder.description: Optional workspace-relative folder to limit the scan scope. Defaults to the entire workspace root.

maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files to scan. Defaults to 100.

languageModelTools.name: a11y_get_rule
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns the full definition of a specific WCAG or AccessMonitor accessibility rule: its description, affected WCAG success criterion, conformance level, default severity, fix guidance, and reference URL. Use this to explain a rule to the user or to get more context before fixing a violation.

ruleId.description: The rule ID to look up, e.g. 'img_01b', 'title_02', 'aria_01', 'hx_03'.
